headline: You will soon be able to vote in Amazon shareholder meetings from a crypto wallet
summary: If you hold a tokenized share of Amazon through Ondo Finance, you can now vote in Amazon's shareholder meetings directly from your crypto wallet. That was not possible six months ago. It is the kind of parity with traditional markets that the tokenized equity space has been promising for years, and ...
